data.title: Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Sees Surge in Outpatient Visits Amid Cost-Effective Service Expansion
data.description:
Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co ( (HK:2120) ) has shared an update.

Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co., Ltd. reported a significant increase in outpatient visits by 40.6% for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the same period in 2024. This growth is attributed to the expansion of lower-priced online healthcare services and a restructuring of medical service offerings. Despite the increase in patient visits, the company experienced a notable decrease in average spending per visit and per inpatient bed-day, reflecting a strategic shift towards more cost-effective healthcare solutions. The announcement highlights the company’s efforts to optimize its service mix and expand its market reach through digital healthcare initiatives.

More about Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co

Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co., Ltd. operates in the healthcare industry, focusing on providing inpatient and outpatient services through its owned hospitals. The company is involved in offering treatment, general healthcare services, and pharmaceutical sales, with a particular emphasis on expanding online healthcare services.

data.title: China New Economy Fund Ltd. Announces Rights Issue to Raise HK$231.65 Million
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from China New Economy Fund Ltd. ( (HK:0080) ).

China New Economy Fund Ltd. has announced a proposed rights issue to raise up to approximately HK$231.65 million by offering one rights share for every two existing shares held. The controlling shareholder, holding 50.77% of the company’s shares, has committed to maintaining its shareholding and participating in the rights issue, ensuring a significant level of support. This move is not subject to shareholder approval under the Listing Rules, as it does not increase the company’s market capitalization by more than 50%.

data.title: Greatview Aseptic Packaging Announces Investigation Findings Amid Trading Suspension
data.description:
Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company ( (HK:0468) ) has shared an update.

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited has announced key findings from a special investigation initiated in early 2025, following concerns raised about a restructuring that involved a significant change in its international business holdings. The investigation, conducted by Grant Thornton Advisory Services Limited, addressed issues related to the consolidation of international business, accuracy of restructuring information, and alleged financial disclosure inaccuracies. The findings have led to a continued suspension of trading in the company’s shares, impacting stakeholders and raising questions about the company’s financial practices and governance.

More about Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company

Greatview Aseptic Packaging Company Limited operates in the packaging industry, specializing in aseptic packaging solutions. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Noah Holdings Adjusts Investment Strategy in Digital Yield Fund
data.description:
Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A ( (HK:6686) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Noah Holdings has announced an alteration in the terms of its subscription to a private credit digital yield fund, reducing its capital allocation from $50 million in Class A interests to $5 million in Class B interests. This decision was influenced by recent changes in the cryptocurrency regulatory landscape in the United States and interest rate cuts, prompting the company to seek more flexible exposure to Bitcoin and align with its investment objectives and prudent treasury management principles.

More about Noah Holdings Ltd. Class A

Noah Holdings Private Wealth and Asset Management Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the financial services industry with a focus on private wealth and asset management. The company is involved in investment activities, particularly in digital assets, and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Yunfeng Financial Ventures into Crypto Insurance with Anthea Investment
data.description:
The latest update is out from Yunfeng Financial Group Limited ( (HK:0376) ).

Yunfeng Financial Group Limited has announced a strategic investment in Anthea Global Crypto Life Insurance Company, marking a significant move into the crypto-based insurance sector. data.description:
Applied Development Holdings ( (HK:0519) ) just unveiled an update.

Novautek Technologies Group Limited has announced a cooperation agreement with Tsinghua University’s Wuxi Research Institute of Applied Technologies to foster industry-academia-research applications.
